Who We Are

Lesotho's Most
Complete Creative
Agency

Priority Media Productions was founded by Rorisang Mphongoa with a single mission: to give businesses in Lesotho and Southern Africa access to world-class creative, digital, and business services — without having to source five different agencies.

From a brand film to a tax return, from a product shoot to a custom web application — we are the one call you need to make.
